data.title: Prospective Analgesic Compound Efficacy (PACE) Study
data.brief_summary: A 24-week observational prospective study on the efficacy of topical non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drugs for the relief of pain.
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* 4.1.1 Primary complaint or clinical findings of arthritis, tendonitis, gout, synovitis, radiculopathy, muscle spasms, migraines, and/or idiopathic pain.

4.1.2 No new pain medications of any kind in the last 4 weeks. 4.1.3 Between the ages of 18-85yrs.

Exclusion Criteria:

*
endpoints: subjective pain control as measured by a 10-point visual analog scale (VAS).
